nasb.text: and their grain offering, fine flour mixed with oil: three-tenths of an ephah for each of the thirteen bulls, two-tenths for each of the two rams,

esv.text: and their grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil, three tenths of an ephah for each of the thirteen bulls, two tenths for each of the two rams,

cnv.text: 同獻的素祭，是用油調和的細麵，為那十三頭公牛，每隻要獻三公斤；為那兩隻公綿羊，每隻要獻兩公斤；

ccb.text: 同时要献上调了油的细面粉作素祭，每头公牛犊需献三公斤素祭，每只公绵羊需献两公斤素祭，
